title: Device Home Screen - Default Quick Settings
scenario: Verify that the three quick settings displayed on the Device Home Screen match the first three options from the settings screen when a device is paired.
steps: 1. Pair a device with the app.
2. Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
3. Observe the quick settings displayed under the device's image.
expected: Three quick settings should be displayed under the device's image, and they must always be the first three options from the settings screen.
